scripts.test: TEST_ENV=local npm run e2e:setup && npm run e2e:test ; API_URL=http://localhost:5000/prod npm run e2e:cleanup
scripts.test:prod: API_URL=https://api.baita.help npm run e2e:setup && npm run e2e:test ; npm run e2e:cleanup
scripts.visual: TEST_ENV=local playwright test --project=visual ; API_URL=http://localhost:5000/prod npm run e2e:cleanup
scripts.visual:ci: TEST_ENV=local VISUAL_STRICT=1 playwright test --project=visual ; npm run e2e:cleanup
scripts.visual:update: TEST_ENV=local playwright test --project=visual --update-snapshots ; API_URL=http://localhost:5000/prod npm run e2e:cleanup
